creator: anzah1@gmail.com
text:
x11/e17-module-engage is missing a depency on x11-toolkits/ewl

checking for ewl-config... no
checking for ewl - version >= 0.0.1... no
*** The ewl-config script installed by ewl could not be found
*** If ewl was installed in PREFIX, make sure PREFIX/bin is in
*** your path, or set the EWL_CONFIG environment variable to the
*** full path to ewl-config.
configure: error: Cannot find ewl: Is ewl-config in path?
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru [maintainer] and attach the
"/usr/ports/x11/e17-module-engage/work/engage-20060719/config.log" including
the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea
to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. an `ls
/var/db/pkg`).
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11/e17-module-engage.

Fix: 

Install x11-toolkits/ewl
How-To-Repeat: Compile x11/e17-module-engage from ports
